creator: flz@xbsd.org
text:
I haven't build-tested it yet but is there a good reason to include
{db,main}.inc.php in the packing list? I think the now-well-known
@{un,}exec would be better.

Also, you've been sending updates for roundcube on a regular basis,
would you be interested in maintaining the port?

-- 
Florent Thoumie
flz@FreeBSD.org
FreeBSD Committer
